info.title: Roslynator Command Line Tool version 0.12.0.0 (Roslyn version 4.14.0.0)

options.name: --analyzer-assemblies
options.description: Define one or more paths to an analyzer assembly or a directory that should be searched recursively for analyzer assemblies.

options.name: --culture
options.description: Defines culture that should be used to display diagnostic message.

options.name: --exclude
options.description: Space separated list of glob patterns to exclude files, folders, solutions or projects.

options.name: --execution-time
options.description: Indicates whether to measure execution time of each analyzer.

options.name: --file-log
options.description: Path to a file that should store output.

options.name: --file-log-verbosity
options.description: Verbosity of the file log. Allowed values are q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal], d[etailed] and diag[nostic].

options.name: --help
options.description: Show command line help.

options.name: --ignore-analyzer-references
options.description: Indicates whether analyzers that are referenced in a project should be ignored.

options.name: --ignore-compiler-diagnostics
options.description: Indicates whether to display compiler diagnostics.

options.name: --ignored-diagnostics
options.description: Defines diagnostics that should not be reported.

options.name: --ignored-projects
options.description: Defines projects that should not be analyzed.

options.name: --include
options.description: Space separated list of glob patterns to include files, folders, solutions or projects.

options.name: --language
options.description: Defines project language. Allowed values are cs[harp] or v[isual-]b[asic].

options.name: --msbuild-path
options.description: Defines a path to MSBuild directory.

options.name: --output
options.description: Defines path to file that will store reported diagnostics. The format of the file is determined by the --output-format option, with the default being xml.

options.name: --output-format
options.description: Defines the file format of the report written to file. Supported options are: gitlab and xml, with xml the default if no option is provided.

options.name: --projects
options.description: Defines projects that should be analyzed.

options.name: --properties
options.description: Defines one or more MSBuild properties.

options.name: --report-not-configurable
options.description: Indicates whether diagnostics with 'NotConfigurable' tag should be reported.

options.name: --report-suppressed-diagnostics
options.description: Indicates whether suppressed diagnostics should be reported.

options.name: --severity-level
options.description: Defines minimally required severity for a diagnostic. Allowed values are hidden, info (default), warning or error.

options.name: --supported-diagnostics
options.description: Defines diagnostics that should be reported.

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Verbosity of the log. Allowed values are q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal], d[etailed] and diag[nostic].

options.name: --exclude
options.description: Space separated list of glob patterns to exclude files, folders, solutions or projects.

options.name: --file-log
options.description: Path to a file that should store output.

options.name: --file-log-verbosity
options.description: Verbosity of the file log. Allowed values are q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal], d[etailed] and diag[nostic].

options.name: --help
options.description: Show command line help.

options.name: --ignored-projects
options.description: Defines projects that should not be analyzed.

options.name: --include
options.description: Space separated list of glob patterns to include files, folders, solutions or projects.

options.name: --language
options.description: Defines project language. Allowed values are cs[harp] or v[isual-]b[asic].

options.name: --msbuild-path
options.description: Defines a path to MSBuild directory.

options.name: --projects
options.description: Defines projects that should be analyzed.

options.name: --properties
options.description: Defines one or more MSBuild properties.

options.name: --remove
options.description: Remove found symbols' declarations.

options.name: --symbol-kind
options.description: Space separated list of symbol kinds to be included. Allowed values are class, delegate, enum, interface, struct, event, field, enum-field, const, method, property, indexer, member and type.

options.name: --unused
options.description: Search only for symbols that have zero references.

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Verbosity of the log. Allowed values are q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal], d[etailed] and diag[nostic].

options.name: --visibility
options.description: Space separated list of visibilities of a type or a member. Allowed values are public, internal and private.

options.name: --with-attribute
options.description: Space separated list of attributes that should be included.

options.name: --without-attribute
options.description: Space separated list of attributes that should be excluded.

options.name: --analyzer-assemblies
options.description: Define one or more paths to an analyzer assembly or a directory that should be searched recursively for analyzer assemblies.

options.name: --batch-size
options.description: Defines maximum number of diagnostics that can be fixed in one batch.

options.name: --culture
options.description: Defines culture that should be used to display diagnostic message.

options.name: --diagnostic-fix-map
options.description: Defines mapping between diagnostic and its fix (CodeAction).

options.name: --diagnostic-fixer-map
options.description: Defines mapping between diagnostic and its fixer (CodeFixProvider).

options.name: --diagnostics-fixable-one-by-one
options.description: Defines diagnostics that can be fixed even if there is no FixAllProvider for them.

options.name: --exclude
options.description: Space separated list of glob patterns to exclude files, folders, solutions or projects.

options.name: --file-banner
options.description: Defines text that should be at the of each source file.

options.name: --file-log
options.description: Path to a file that should store output.

options.name: --file-log-verbosity
options.description: Verbosity of the file log. Allowed values are q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal], d[etailed] and diag[nostic].

options.name: --fix-scope
options.description: Defines fix scope. Allowed values are project (default) or document.

options.name: --format
options.description: Indicates whether each document should be formatted.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show command line help.

options.name: --ignore-analyzer-references
options.description: Indicates whether analyzers that are referenced in a project should be ignored.

options.name: --ignore-compiler-errors
options.description: Indicates whether fixing should continue even if compilation has errors.

options.name: --ignored-compiler-diagnostics
options.description: Defines compiler diagnostics that should be ignored even if --ignore-compiler-errors is not set.

options.name: --ignored-diagnostics
options.description: Defines diagnostics that should not be reported.

options.name: --ignored-projects
options.description: Defines projects that should not be analyzed.

options.name: --include
options.description: Space separated list of glob patterns to include files, folders, solutions or projects.

options.name: --language
options.description: Defines project language. Allowed values are cs[harp] or v[isual-]b[asic].

options.name: --max-iterations
options.description: Defines maximum numbers of fixing iterations.

options.name: --msbuild-path
options.description: Defines a path to MSBuild directory.

options.name: --projects
options.description: Defines projects that should be analyzed.

options.name: --properties
options.description: Defines one or more MSBuild properties.

options.description: Defines minimally required severity for a diagnostic. Allowed values are hidden, info (default), warning or error.

options.name: --supported-diagnostics
options.description: Defines diagnostics that should be reported.

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Verbosity of the log. Allowed values are q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal], d[etailed] and diag[nostic].

options.name: --ignored-projects
options.description: Defines projects that should not be analyzed.

options.name: --include
options.description: Space separated list of glob patterns to include files, folders, solutions or projects.

options.name: --include-generated-code
options.description: Indicates whether generated code should be formatted.

options.name: --language
options.description: Defines project language. Allowed values are cs[harp] or v[isual-]b[asic].

options.name: --msbuild-path
options.description: Defines a path to MSBuild directory.

options.name: --projects
options.description: Defines projects that should be analyzed.

options.name: --properties
options.description: Defines one or more MSBuild properties.

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Verbosity of the log. Allowed values are q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal], d[etailed] and diag[nostic].

options.name: --additional-xml-documentation
options.description: Defines one or more xml documentation files that should be included. These files can contain a documentation for namespaces, for instance.

options.name: --depth
options.description: Defines a depth of a documentation. Allowed values are member (default), type or namespace.

options.name: --exclude
options.description: Space separated list of glob patterns to exclude files, folders, solutions or projects.

options.name: --file-log
options.description: Path to a file that should store output.

options.name: --file-log-verbosity
options.description: Verbosity of the file log. Allowed values are q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal], d[etailed] and diag[nostic].

options.name: --files-layout
options.description: Defines layout of documentation files. Allowed values are hierarchical (default) or flat-namespaces.

options.name: --group-by-common-namespace
options.description: Indicates whether to group namespaces by greatest common namespace.

options.name: --heading
options.description: Defines a heading of the root documentation file.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show command line help.

options.name: --host
options.description: Defines a host where the content will be published. Allowed values are docusaurus, github or sphinx.

options.name: --ignored-common-parts
options.description: Defines common parts of a documentation that should be excluded. Allowed value is content.

options.name: --ignored-member-parts
options.description: Defines parts of a member documentation that should be excluded. Allowed values are overloads, containing-type, containing-assembly, obsolete-message, summary, declaration, type-parameters, parameters, return-value, implements, attributes, exceptions, examples, remarks and see-also.

options.name: --ignored-names
options.description: Defines a list of metadata names that should be excluded from a documentation. Namespace of type names can be specified.

options.name: --ignored-namespace-parts
options.description: Defines parts of a namespace documentation that should be excluded. Allowed values are content, containing-namespace, summary, examples, remarks, classes, structs, interfaces, enums, delegates and see-also.

options.name: --ignored-projects
options.description: Defines projects that should not be analyzed.

options.name: --ignored-root-parts
options.description: Defines parts of a root documentation that should be excluded. Allowed values are content, namespaces, class-hierarchy, types, other and all.

options.name: --ignored-title-parts
options.description: Defines title parts of a documentation that should be excluded. Allowed value is containing-namespace, containing-type, parameters and explicit-implementation.

options.name: --ignored-type-parts
options.description: Defines parts of a type documentation that should be excluded. Allowed values are content, containing-namespace, containing-assembly, obsolete-message, summary, declaration, type-parameters, parameters, return-value, inheritance, attributes, derived, implements, examples, remarks, constructors, fields, indexers, properties, methods, operators, events, explicit-interface-implementations, extension-methods, classes, structs, interfaces, enums, delegates and see-also.

options.name: --include
options.description: Space separated list of glob patterns to include files, folders, solutions or projects.

options.name: --include-all-derived-types
options.description: Indicates whether all derived types should be included in the list of derived types. By default only types that directly inherits from a specified type are displayed.

options.name: --include-containing-namespace
options.description: Defines parts of a documentation that should include containing namespace. Allowed values are class-hierarchy, containing-type, parameter, return-type, base-type, attribute, derived-type, implemented-interface, implemented-member, exception, see-also and all.

options.name: --include-ienumerable
options.description: Indicates whether interface System.Collections.IEnumerable should be included in a documentation if a type also implements interface System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<T>.

options.name: --include-inherited-interface-members
options.description: Indicates whether inherited interface members should be displayed in a list of members.

options.name: --include-system-namespace
options.description: Indicates whether namespace should be included when a type is directly contained in namespace 'System'.

options.name: --inheritance-style
options.description: Defines a style of a type inheritance. Allowed values are horizontal (default) or vertical.

options.name: --language
options.description: Defines project language. Allowed values are cs[harp] or v[isual-]b[asic].

options.name: --max-derived-types
options.description: Defines maximum number derived types that should be displayed. Default value is 5.

options.name: --msbuild-path
options.description: Defines a path to MSBuild directory.

options.name: --no-delete
options.description: Indicates whether output directory should not be deleted at the beginning of the process.

options.name: --no-mark-obsolete
options.description: Indicates whether obsolete types and members should not be marked as '[deprecated]'.

options.name: --no-precedence-for-system
options.description: Indicates whether symbols contained in 'System' namespace should be ordered as any other symbols and not before other symbols.

options.name: --no-wrap-base-types
options.description: Indicates whether base types should not be wrapped.

options.name: --no-wrap-constraints
options.description: Indicates whether constraints should not be wrapped.

options.name: --omit-attribute-arguments
options.description: Indicates whether attribute arguments should be omitted when displaying an attribute.

options.name: --omit-inherited-attributes
options.description: Indicates whether inherited attributes should be omitted.

options.name: --omit-member-parts
options.description: Defines parts of member definition that should be omitted. Allowed values are constant-value, implements, inherited-from and overrides.

options.name: --output
options.description: Defines a path for the output directory.

options.name: --preferred-culture
options.description: Defines culture that should be used when searching for xml documentation files.

options.name: --projects
options.description: Defines projects that should be analyzed.

options.name: --properties
options.description: Defines one or more MSBuild properties.

options.name: --root-file-path
options.description: Defines path to a documentation root file. If not specified, output directory will be used.

options.name: --scroll-to-content
options.description: Indicates whether a link should lead to the top of the documentation content. This option is applicable when host is set to 'github'.

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Verbosity of the log. Allowed values are q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal], d[etailed] and diag[nostic].

options.name: --visibility
options.description: Defines a visibility of a type or a member. Allowed values are public (default), internal or private.

options.name: --depth
options.description: Defines a depth of a list of symbols. Allowed values are member (default), type or namespace.

options.name: --documentation
options.description: Indicates whether a documentation should be included.

options.name: --empty-line-between-members
options.description: Indicates whether an empty line should be added between two member definitions.

options.name: --exclude
options.description: Space separated list of glob patterns to exclude files, folders, solutions or projects.

options.name: --external-assemblies
options.description: Defines file name/path to external assemblies that should be included.

options.name: --file-log
options.description: Path to a file that should store output.

options.name: --file-log-verbosity
options.description: Verbosity of the file log. Allowed values are q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal], d[etailed] and diag[nostic].

options.name: --group-by-assembly
options.description: Indicates whether symbols should be grouped by assembly.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show command line help.

options.name: --hierarchy-root
options.description: Defines symbol that should be used as a root of a type hierarchy.

options.name: --ignored-attributes
options.description: Defines a list of attributes that should be ignored.

options.name: --ignored-parts
options.description: Defines parts of a symbol definition that should be excluded. Allowed values are assemblies, containing-namespace, containing-namespace-in-type-hierarchy, attributes, assembly-attributes, attribute-arguments, accessibility, modifiers, parameter-name, parameter-default-value, base-type, base-interfaces, constraints, trailing-semicolon, trailing-comma.

options.name: --ignored-projects
options.description: Defines projects that should not be analyzed.

options.name: --ignored-symbols
options.description: Defines a list of symbols that should be ignored. Namespace of types can be specified.

options.name: --include
options.description: Space separated list of glob patterns to include files, folders, solutions or projects.

options.name: --indent-chars
options.description: Defines characters that should be used for indentation. Default value is two spaces.

options.name: --language
options.description: Defines project language. Allowed values are cs[harp] or v[isual-]b[asic].

options.name: --layout
options.description: Defines layout of a list of symbol definitions. Allowed values are namespace-list (default), namespace-hierarchy or type-hierarchy.

options.name: --msbuild-path
options.description: Defines a path to MSBuild directory.

options.name: --output
options.description: Defines path to file(s) that will store a list of symbol definitions.

options.name: --projects
options.description: Defines projects that should be analyzed.

options.name: --properties
options.description: Defines one or more MSBuild properties.

options.name: --wrap-list
options.description: Specifies syntax lists that should be wrapped. Allowed values are attributes, parameters, base-types and constraints.

options.description: Space separated list of glob patterns to exclude files, folders, solutions or projects.

arguments.name: PATH
arguments.description: A path to a directory, project file or a ruleset file.

options.name: --ask
options.description: Ask whether to rename a symbol.

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: List symbols to be renamed but do not save changes to a disk.

options.name: --include

options.name: --include-generated-code
options.description: Include symbols that are part of generated code.

options.name: --interactive
options.description: Enable editing of a new name.

options.name: --language
options.description: Defines project language. Allowed values are cs[harp] or v[isual-]b[asic].

options.name: --match
options.description: C# expression that can be used as a expression body of a method 'bool M(ISymbol symbol)'.

options.name: --match-from
options.description: Path to a C# code file that contains publicly accessible method with signature 'bool M(ISymbol symbol)'.

options.name: --msbuild-path
options.description: Defines a path to MSBuild directory.

options.name: --new-name
options.description: C# expression that can be used as a expression body of a method 'string M(ISymbol symbol)'

options.name: --new-name-from
options.description: Path to a C# code file that contains publicly accessible method with signature 'string M(ISymbol symbol)'

options.name: --on-error
options.description: Action to choose when renaming of a symbol causes compilation error. Allowed values are abort, ask, fix, list and skip.

options.name: --projects
options.description: Defines projects that should be analyzed.

options.name: --properties
options.description: Defines one or more MSBuild properties.

options.name: --scope
options.description: Symbol groups to be included. Allowed values are type, member and local.

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Verbosity of the log. Allowed values are q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal], d[etailed] and diag[nostic].

options.name: --case-sensitive
options.description: Specifies case-sensitive matching.

options.name: --culture
options.description: Defines culture that should be used to display diagnostic message.

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Display misspellings and typos but do not save changes to a disk.

options.name: --exclude

options.name: --file-log-verbosity

options.name: --help

options.name: --ignored-projects
options.description: Defines projects that should not be analyzed.

options.name: --ignored-scope
options.description: Defines syntax that should not be analyzed. Allowed values are comment, type, member, local, parameter, literal, non-symbol, symbol and file-name.

options.name: --include
options.description: Space separated list of glob patterns to include files, folders, solutions or projects.

options.name: --include-generated-code
options.description: Indicates whether generated code should be spellchecked.

options.name: --interactive
options.description: Enable editing of a replacement.

options.name: --language
options.description: Defines project language. Allowed values are cs[harp] or v[isual-]b[asic].

options.name: --max-word-length
options.description: Specifies maximal word length to be checked.

options.name: --min-word-length
options.description: Specifies minimal word length to be checked. Default value is 3.

options.name: --msbuild-path
options.description: Defines a path to MSBuild directory.

options.name: --projects
options.description: Defines projects that should be analyzed.

options.name: --properties
options.description: Defines one or more MSBuild properties.

options.name: --scope
options.description: Defines syntax that should be analyzed. Allowed values are comment, type, member, local, parameter, literal, non-symbol, symbol, file-name and all. Literals and file names are not analyzed by default.

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Verbosity of the log. Allowed values are q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal], d[etailed] and diag[nostic].

options.name: --visibility
options.description: Defines a  maximal visibility of a symbol to be fixable. Allowed values are public (default), internal or private.

options.name: --words
options.description: Specified path to file and/or directory that contains list of known words.
